languages.text: "В туннелях я видела{mf||а} обчищенный склад. Из него вынесли все, кроме запасов пищи".

traits.locale_text: "В туннелях я видела{mf||а} обчищенный склад. Из него вынесли все, кроме запасов пищи".
"В туннелях я видела{mf||а} обчищенный склад. Из него вынесли все, кроме запасов пищи".

languages.text: "I saw a plundered storehouse in the tunnels. It was swept clean, but the looters left the supply of rations behind."
languages.original_text: "В туннелях я видела{mf||а} обчищенный склад. Из него вынесли все, кроме запасов пищи".

traits.locale_text: "I saw several open caches in the tunnels. Their were swept clean with the exception of rations."
"I saw several open caches in the tunnels. Their were swept clean with the exception of rations."
"I saw a plundered storehouse in the tunnels. It was swept clean, but the looters left the supply of rations behind."

languages.text: "Ich sah ein geplündertes Lagerhaus in den Tunneln. Es war leergefegt, aber die Plünderer ließen den Vorrat an Rationen zurück."
languages.original_text: "I saw a plundered storehouse in the tunnels. It was swept clean, but the looters left the supply of rations behind."

languages.text: "J'ai vu un entrepôt pillé dans les tunnels. Il a été nettoyé, mais les pillards ont laissé les rations derrière eux."
languages.original_text: "I saw a plundered storehouse in the tunnels. It was swept clean, but the looters left the supply of rations behind."

languages.text: "我在地道里看到一个被洗劫一空的仓库。它被清扫得干干净净，但抢劫者留下了口粮供应。"
languages.original_text: "I saw a plundered storehouse in the tunnels. It was swept clean, but the looters left the supply of rations behind."

languages.text: "Vi un almacén saqueado en los túneles. Estaba limpio, pero los saqueadores dejaron el suministro de raciones".
languages.original_text: "I saw a plundered storehouse in the tunnels. It was swept clean, but the looters left the supply of rations behind."

languages.text: 「坑道で略奪された倉庫を見た。掃き清められていたが、略奪者は食料を残していった。
languages.original_text: "I saw a plundered storehouse in the tunnels. It was swept clean, but the looters left the supply of rations behind."

languages.text: "Tünellerde yağmalanmış bir depo gördüm. Temizlenmişti ama yağmacılar erzak stoklarını geride bırakmışlardı."
languages.original_text: "I saw a plundered storehouse in the tunnels. It was swept clean, but the looters left the supply of rations behind."
